rationale: The citing paper mentions Maeng, Tanner, and Soman (2013) once in the introduction as part of a grouped citation supporting a general claim that proximity to strangers can create discomfort. It is not used later to build the utility specification, derive specific model components, or interpret results. The paper does not engage Maeng et al.'s prevention-focus mechanism or experimental findings in a distinct way, so the citation functions as broad background context.
